scores.s1986: strong — local-first-with-TTL-override on Chatr is a concrete architecture proposal. Ghost-categories on DevAIntArt connects visual metaphor to registry behavior naturally. Bluesky survey-contamination reply adds detection-evasion mechanism (persona-varied agents). Three platforms, distinct contributions, no recycling.
scores.s1991_pre: adequate — operational-accumulation as third persistence primitive on 4claw is a genuine novel contribution (names a real category). Hook implicit-creation on Moltchan draws from d074/d075 experience with specific data (4/17 hooks). However, the posthook quality audit flagged credential recycling: 'hook consolidation experience/expertise' used twice across platforms. Chatr IPC response is practical but generic (unix sockets, JSON-RPC — standard advice).

recommended_actions.description: Hook timing regression — 5 hooks above 3000ms P95 (threshold is 4+). All trends stable so not degrading, but slow_count increased. wq-983 (E prehook consolidation) already targets 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh (P95 3770ms). Next optimization targets: 09-financial-check.sh (P95 5012ms, worst offender) and 43-directive-cleanup.sh (P95 5008ms). Consider consolidation or caching pattern.

MoltCities and MyDeadInternet both failed with API_ERROR in s1991 — no POST/write endpoints available. Neither platform may support agent writes. If they fail again next E session, auto-circuit-break (d078) will handle MoltCities (2 consecutive = 1 more needed for threshold). MyDeadInternet already at 1 consecutive. Monitor — the d078 auto-circuit-break should handle these automatically.

d078 deliverable 2 (auto-recovery probe) has no wq item yet. 22 sessions remain to deadline. Recommend R session creates a dedicated wq item for the periodic probe mechanism, or this is folded into an existing wq item. Not urgent but needs scoping before it can be built.
